candidates.why: A separate operating-level depreciation row is visible above the financial section, but it is a single unallocated total and shows no values in the excerpt. It is not labelled as COGS/cost of revenues depreciation, so adding it to the selected COGS bucket would risk misallocation or double counting.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The only D&A row is a blank, unallocated operating total, so it should not be added separately to COGS.

candidates.why: A separate operating-level depreciation row is visible above the financial section, but it is a single unallocated total and shows no values in the excerpt. It is not labelled as SG&A/administrative/sales-and-distribution depreciation, so adding it to the selected SG&A components would risk misallocation or double counting.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The only D&A row is a blank, unallocated operating total, so it should not be added separately to XSGA components.
